item.title: She left for school — and never arrived
item.description: A routine morning turned into a family's worst nightmare when a young girl vanished on her way to school. This is a look at the case, the search, and the pursuit of answers.

media:content.media:title: She left for school — and never arrived
media:content.media:description: A routine morning turned into a family's worst nightmare when a young girl vanished on her way to school. This is a look at the case, the search, and the pursuit of answers.

item.title: The last call of Maria Gonzalez, age 11
item.description: Maria Gonzalez told her father someone was at the door — and then went silent. This is the story of what happened and the investigation that followed her disappearance

media:content.media:title: The last call of Maria Gonzalez, age 11
media:content.media:description: Maria Gonzalez told her father someone was at the door — and then went silent. This is the story of what happened and the investigation that followed her disappearance

item.title: What an Apple Watch recorded in 18 minutes
item.description: A piece of everyday technology became a key piece of evidence in a deeply troubling case. What those 18 minutes captured changed everything about the investigation that followed

media:content.media:title: What an Apple Watch recorded in 18 minutes
media:content.media:description: A piece of everyday technology became a key piece of evidence in a deeply troubling case. What those 18 minutes captured changed everything about the investigation that followed

item.title: The case of Paulette Gebara — part two
item.description: The search for justice for four-year-old Paulette Gebara continues. Part two takes a closer look at the details of her case and the unanswered questions that still remain.

media:content.media:title: The case of Paulette Gebara — part two
media:content.media:description: The search for justice for four-year-old Paulette Gebara continues. Part two takes a closer look at the details of her case and the unanswered questions that still remain.

item.title: A rejection that ended in tragedy — a true crime case
item.description: What should have been an ordinary moment turned fatal when a woman's refusal was met with violence. This case is a sobering reminder of the dangers some face in everyday situations

media:content.media:title: A rejection that ended in tragedy — a true crime case
media:content.media:description: What should have been an ordinary moment turned fatal when a woman's refusal was met with violence. This case is a sobering reminder of the dangers some face in everyday situations

item.title: The disappearance of Elizabeth Salgado
item.description: Elizabeth Salgado vanished without warning, leaving behind a community desperate for answers. This is a look at the details of her case and the search for justice that followed.

media:content.media:title: The disappearance of Elizabeth Salgado
media:content.media:description: Elizabeth Salgado vanished without warning, leaving behind a community desperate for answers. This is a look at the details of her case and the search for justice that followed.

item.title: A warning that went unheeded — a case revisited
item.description: She told people exactly what to look for if something went wrong. This is the case behind one of true crime's most haunting last statements — and what happened after.

media:content.media:title: A warning that went unheeded — a case revisited
media:content.media:description: She told people exactly what to look for if something went wrong. This is the case behind one of true crime's most haunting last statements — and what happened after.

item.title: This is what happened to 16 yr old Emely Peguero
item.description: The story of Emely Peguero is a deeply troubling one — a young life cut short and a case that continues to draw attention for all the right reasons. Her story matters.

media:content.media:title: This is what happened to 16 yr old Emely Peguero
media:content.media:description: The story of Emely Peguero is a deeply troubling one — a young life cut short and a case that continues to draw attention for all the right reasons. Her story matters.

item.title: This is what happened to 12 year old Florencia DI Marco
item.description: Florencia Di Marco tried to speak out about what was happening to her — but no one acted in time. A case that raises serious questions about the systems meant to protect children.

media:content.media:title: This is what happened to 12 year old Florencia DI Marco
media:content.media:description: Florencia Di Marco tried to speak out about what was happening to her — but no one acted in time. A case that raises serious questions about the systems meant to protect children.
